data.body: Started on branch feat/consistent-error-handling-ring-gun-jot. Order: 8fbd substrate -> 16a1 exemplar -> sweeps (8d01,ceaa,d360,fd72,0569) -> 0ec1 close-out. Installed pipx CLI ignores require_plan_review_for_claim (unknown key) and pydantic_ai not installed, so LLM gates can't run locally; doing the real code remediation and tracking in rebar. Claimed 8fbd.
